nasb.text: Then these commissioners and satraps came by agreement to the king and spoke to him as follows: “King Darius, live forever!

esv.text: Then these high officials and satraps came by agreement to the king and said to him, “O King Darius, live forever!

cnv.text: 這些監察司和總督就相約前來見王，對他說：“願大利烏王萬歲！

ccb.text: 于是，这些总长和总督齐来见王，说：“愿大流士王万岁！
